key.name: clicks-per-second
key.description: How many clicks the autoclicker should emit every second when active.

key.name: mouse-button
key.description: Which mouse button the autoclicker should press.

key.name: restore-token
key.description: Saved token returned by the GNOME remote desktop portal so access can be restored without prompting every time.

key.name: toggle-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut used to toggle the autoclicker on and off.
